name: lenzon-explain-pr
description: Watch a Lenzon explainer for a PR without leaving VS Code.

lenzon.apiBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL of the Lenzon service the `player-link` contract is called against. Use `http://localhost:3001` for a local server. (Use `www.lenzon.ai` — the non-www host redirects and can strip auth headers.)

lenzon.apiToken.markdownDescription: **Legacy / dev override.** A Lenzon API key sent as the Bearer token on the `player-link` call. The supported path is now **Lenzon: Sign in** (device flow), which stores the token securely in VS Code SecretStorage — that takes precedence over this setting. Leave blank unless you're testing with a manually-minted key. Treat as a secret.

lenzon.devPrNumber.markdownDescription: Optional explicit PR override: request this PR number for the detected repo regardless of the checked-out branch (handy for testing a specific PR). `0` means unset — resolve the PR from the current branch.

lenzon.devMode.markdownDescription: Show developer-only commands (e.g. **Lenzon: Test Harness (dev)**) in the Command Palette. Off by default.
